roa.docketEntryComment: HG WHET PROB SHD REM REV
HG WHET PROB SHD REM REV

DA MO AMEND INFO CT1-FRM 11350(A)HS/F TO 32PC/F;DEFT WVS ANY/ALL IRREGSMO W/D PLEA NG GRTD;ADV/PERS WVS CONSTL/CITIZ RTS;PLD G CT1-32PC/FCRT MKES FNDGS/ACCEPTS PLEA;REF APD/PSR;CONT 11/22/93 AT 9AM S28 FOR SENTCRT GRTS DA MO DISM REM CT PURS 1385PC;VAC TRL DATE 11/22/93
/SEE MINUTES OF 06-05-95, DEPARTMENT 23,///THE MATTER IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR,/
PROB TERM UNSUCC PER DISPO IN #159550
S/ELLIS APPTD AS CNSL;CONT 6/5/95 FOR HG REV PROB BY APD 9AM IN D23
CONT 5/10/95 AT 9AM IN D23 FOR REV HRG - APD
PD APPTD;REF APD S/R TOBE FILED 4/21/95;CONT 4/21/95 9AM S22-TS REV HG-DA
FTA;BW NB;PROB REV;MTR/DA-GRTD;O/C
F/AJW;ISS3YPROB;PJ2D;CTS2D;W/S T/C BY APD;RX;VFI;PC;PSR;ACCEPTS T/C PROB
DEFT PERS WVD TIME FOR SENT;CONT 1/14/94 AT 9AM IN S28 FOR SENT
DEFT WVD TIME FOR SENT;CONT 12/13/93 AT 9AM IN S28 FOR SENT
DEFT MO 995PC DEN PREV ON 7/21/93 IN S21;CONT 10/26/93 S28 FOR FUR PTC
TRANSF FW TO S28 FOR HRG (NOT REPT'D)
DEFT MO FOR ORD PROD DOC 1043EC GRTD-COMPLIANCE DATE 10/14/93 AT 9AM
DEFT PERS ENT GEN T/WVR;TRANSF IN D24 FOR PTC AT 9AM,11/22 93 FOR TRL-D22
DIVERS DEN;CRIM PROC REIN;CONT 8/19/93 AT 9AM IN D22 TO RESET TRIAL
MOTION FOR ORD PROD DOC PURS 1043EC-O/C
CRIM PROC SUSP & DEFT REF TO APD FOR DIVERS RPT;TIME WVDCONT 8/16/93 AT 9AM IN D24 FOR DIVERS ELIG;TRL DATE VACATED
DEFT MO 995PC DEN;DEEMED PRETRIED
PD APPTD;ARRD;CRT ENT NG PLEA EA CT;DEFT PERS ENT GEN TIME WAIVER
HTA, BAIL SET AT ORPJ, MISDEMEANOR CERTIFIED TO SUP CT
